name: delegating-to-otto
description: Drives Astronomer's Otto agent (`astro otto`) as a delegated sub-agent for Airflow, dbt, and data-engineering work.
intent_triggers: use the delegating to otto agent skill
run a workflow for delegating to otto
help me with delegating to otto
我需要處理 delegating to otto 相關工作
幫我啟用 delegating to otto 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 delegating to otto
use delegating to otto from agents

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the delegating to otto skill for this task.
